note: Held/slow ERP state, re-anchored on the 1st business day of each month (or when the real-yield master / SP500 normalized series publish a new vintage). Between anchors ONLY the daily real curve + norm_ey move.

sources.reals_5_10_20_30: Treasury Daily Par Real Yield Curve (5/7/10/20/30); 7y optional belly point
sources.nominal_1y: Treasury Daily Par Yield Curve, 1Y tenor
sources.one_year_real_rule: real_1y = nominal_1y - breakeven1y (breakeven held from the monthly master vintage)
sources.norm_ey_rule: norm_ey = 100 * normalized_X4 * cpi_factor / sp_close  (SP500 normalized earnings LEVEL / real price; price is daily)
